cards.name: Ace of Pentacles
cards.interpretation: new opportunities, resources, abundance, prosperity, security, stability, manifestation

cards.name: ⅩⅠ Justice
cards.interpretation: justice, karma, consequence, accountability, law, truth, honesty, integrity, cause and effect

cards.name: Ⅳ The Emperor, reversed
cards.interpretation: tyrant, domineering, rigid, stubborn, lack of discipline, recklessness
